auth.join_ngo_req: Nta muryango urasabamo uruhushya. Saba kwinjira mu muryango.

landing.title: Gutegura • Gufatanya • Guhindura
landing.tagline: Ihuriro rigezweho ry'imikorere n'ibaruranyandiko ry'imiryango n'amakoperative. Gufatanya mu gushyira ku murongo abanyamuryango, gukurikirana ibitabo by'imari, kugaragaza umusaruro, no gukusanya inkunga.
landing.capabilities_desc: Ha itsinda ryawe ibikoresho bigezweho byo guhuza ibikorwa bihujije n'imikorere yo ku rwego rw'akarere.
landing.card1_desc: Tangiza urubuga rwihariye mu kanya kadashyika (/@slug) rugaragaza ibikorwa bihari, gukurikirana intego, amakuru n'itangazamakuru, ndoze n'urutonde rw'abaterankunga.
landing.card2_desc: Kira neza inkunga binyuze kuri MTN MoMo cyangwa Airtel Money. Emerera abashyigikiye umuryango gushyiraho gihamya y'ubwishyu mu buyobozi.
landing.card3_desc: Yandikisha amakoperative n'abanyamuryango. Loga abanyamuryango, tegura amatsinda, kurikirana abonetse binyuze kuri QR kodi, kandi uyobore amatora.
landing.directory_desc: Shaka porogaramu z'imiryango n'amakoperative akorera mu mucyo mu gihugu cyose.
landing.search_placeholder: Shakisha imiryango ukoresheje izina, icyiciro, cyangwa intego...
landing.pricing_desc: Shyigikira imiyoborere isobanutse. Hitamo urwego rukwiye rufite ibikoresho bizamura imikorere yawe.
landing.faq_desc: Ibyo ukeneye kumenya byose bijyanye no gushyiraho, kugenzura, no kuyobora umuryango wawe kuri Impacto.
landing.contact_box_title: Ufite ibindi bibazo ku miterere ya Impacto?
landing.contact_box_desc: Vugana natwe i Kigali. Turagufasha gushyiraho imirongo y'ibaruranyandiko, kwimurira amakuru yanyu hano, cyangwa uburyo bwihariye bw'ikoranabuhanga.
landing.footer_desc: Ufite ibibazo bijyanye no kwemeza umuryango wanyu kuri iri huriro?

dashboard_labels.welcome_subtitle: Sanga n'imirasire y'amakoperative n'imiryango kuri Impacto.
dashboard_labels.credential_desc: Kugira ngo ubashe gutora cyangwa guhabwa inkunga, shyiraho ifoto isobanutse y'Indangamuntu cyangwa Icyemezo cy'Ikoperative.
dashboard_labels.resignation_desc: Niba wifuza gusezera burundu mu koperative n'uburenganzira bose, uzuza isuzuma ryo gusezera kugira ngo ubuyobozi bubimenye.
dashboard_labels.announcements_subtitle: Tangaza amakuru mashya, ihamagara ry'ubwitange, cyangwa amatangazo y'ubuyobozi ku banyamuryango bose.
dashboard_labels.no_messages: Nta butumwa burajya muri uyu muyoboro. Ba uwa mbere mu kwandika!
dashboard_labels.member_bylaws_warning: Ukurikije amategeko, ubanza gushyiraho umwirondoro w'umunyamuryango mboye kumwandikaho umusanzu we.
dashboard_labels.guidelines_limits_desc: Inyandiko ziremewe: PDF, XLSX, DOCX, Ifoto kugeza kuri MB 15
dashboard_labels.drag_drop_browse: Nyorera inyandiko hano, cyangwa Kanda uhitemo
dashboard_labels.drag_drop_guideline_desc: Nyorera amabwiriza hano kugira ngo abashizemo bose bayagerereho.
dashboard_labels.volunteer_ledger_subtitle: Andika, kurikirana, kandi uyobore ibikorwa byose by'abakorerabushake mu gitabo nyacyo.
dashboard_labels.cooperative_support_survey_question: Ni ibiki umuryango wakora ngo urusheho gufasha neza abandi bakorerabushake?
dashboard_labels.self_attendance_qr_code: Kodi ya QR yo Kwandikisha Ubwitabire bw'Abantu
dashboard_labels.scan_qr_desc: Abantu bashobora gusikana iyi QR bakoresheje terefone zabo ngo baboneke neza, cyangwa ukabajyaho intoki :
dashboard_labels.select_event_qr_desc: Hitamo igikorwa hanyuma ukande "Tunganya Kodi ya QR" kugira ngo ufungure irembo ryo kwemeza ubwitabire.
dashboard_labels.examine_deposit_slips_desc: Sura amashusho y'ubwishyu yashyizweho, genzura ubutumwa bwa MTN/Airtel, hanyuma wemeze imigendekere y'imari.
dashboard_labels.eligibility_guidelines_focus: Byihariye ku canyuurwaho mu kwemererwa inkunga
dashboard_labels.verification_desc_vol: Emeza neza inyandiko zawe z'umwirondoro kugira ngo ubuyobozi bugufungurire uburyo bw'imari bwizewe muri uyu muryango.
dashboard_labels.leave_cooperative_desc: Ufite intego yo gusezera mu koperative? Uzuza isuzuma ryo gusezera ugaragaze n'ibyakorwa neza.
dashboard_labels.go_to_goals_msg: Kanda ku gice cy'Intego hanyuma upfutse inshuro imwe intego ushaka kubona hano.
dashboard_labels.no_announcements_shared: Nta tangazo na rimwe riratanga mu muryango ubu urasubiramo.
dashboard_labels.no_upcoming_calendar: Nta bikorwa biteganyijwe biri ku masaha ya vuba.
dashboard_labels.drag_drop_passport_pdf: Nyorera ifoto ya Pasiporo yawe hano
dashboard_labels.pdf_jpg_png_limit: Inyandiko mbarwa: PDF, JPG, PNG zitarengeje 10 MB.
dashboard_labels.provide_constructive_feedback: Tanga ibitekerezo byubaka ku muryango wetu
dashboard_labels.support_volunteers_better: Ni ibiki umuryango wakora ngo urusheho gufasha neza abandi bakorerabushake?
dashboard_labels.news_feed_subtitle: Amatangazo, amavugurura, n'inyandiko rusange z'uyu muryango.
dashboard_labels.no_news_message: Andika itangazo rya mbere ry'umuryango ukanze kuri bouton iri haruguru.
dashboard_labels.headline_placeholder: Ugereranyije: Kugura ibikoresho byo gupima ubutaka
dashboard_labels.excerpt_placeholder: Tanga incamake mu nteruro imwe cyangwa ziri mbarwa
dashboard_labels.events_board_subtitle: Emeza ibikorwa by'amahugurwa, tegura ibindi bihe, kandi ubone kodi za QR kurekurwa.
dashboard_labels.attendance_logged_success: Ubwitabire bwanditswe neza ku muntu witabiriye!
dashboard_labels.create_session_msg: Kora igihe cyangwa igikorwa cy'abatabazi haruguru kugira ngo usinkonize kalendari.
dashboard_labels.select_event_generate_qr_msg: Hitamo igikorwa hanyuma ukanze "Tunganya Kodi ya QR" kugira ngo ufungure irembo ryo kwemeza.
dashboard_labels.event_name_placeholder: Ugereranyije: Amahugurwa yo gutera ibiti mu Bugesera
dashboard_labels.brief_description_placeholder: Ni izihe ntego n'ibyo twiteze muri iki gikorwa?
dashboard_labels.venue_placeholder: Ugereranyije: Icyumba cy'Amahugurwa cy'i Kayonza, bloc 3
dashboard_labels.publish_public_portal: Ubyerekane ku rubuga rusange rw'umuryango wetu
